violations.text: Delivery temperature logs today French toast arrived at 112 degrees F. Previous days also show food was delivered at temperatures below 135 degrees F, with no Corrective Action. Caterer was called to discuss issue. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2026

Chili was received at improper hot hold temperatures (121 and 130 degrees F.) Delivery was refused, B & M Catering was called and will replace the food. B & M catering English Hot Hold Receiving Temperature Log New Violation. Correct By: 10/28/2025
The floor is in poor repair, with tiles missing. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/01/2026
The floor and wall junctures in the kitchen do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 10/28/2026
